name: Lovebugz: An Anthro Insect Dating Sim
short_description: A point and click visual novel about bug girls.
detailed_description:
Don't be afraid. These bug girls aren't here to hurt you (most of them, anyway). You're a human garbage man, but one fateful morning you accidentally ask a giant housefly out on a date. Play through a handful of bite-sized dates in this chapter-based visual novel world with point and click exploration elements.

Use point and click mechanics to explore an island, room by room, talking to an assorted cast of different bugs and humans (and crabs).

Date a handful of different bug girls, learn how they live their lives, and help them with their problems.

Choose from different choices that may determine how the date goes.

Play through a chapter-based storyline. New chapters will be released in the future.

A cute, cartoony art style.

Collectable candies!
